addToCart: body > div:nth-child(4) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(5) > button:nth-child(2)
checkoutBtn: button[class='flex items-center gap-2 bg-qa-clr hover:bg-blue-600 transition duration-300 ease-in-out text-white px-6 py-2 rounded-3xl cursor-pointer']
contBtn: button[class='flex items-center gap-2 bg-qa-clr hover:bg-blue-600 transition duration-300 ease-in-out text-white px-6 py-2 rounded-3xl cursor-pointer']
itemTotalPrice: body > div:nth-child(4) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(3) > div:nth-child(3) > p:nth-child(2)
finishBtn: button[class='flex items-center gap-2 bg-qa-clr hover:bg-blue-600 transition duration-300 ease-in-out text-white px-8 py-2 rounded-3xl cursor-pointer']
contShoppingBtn: button[class='inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-qa-clr hover:bg-blue-600 transition duration-300 ease-in-out text-white px-6 py-2 rounded-3xl cursor-pointer']
